ContentDemo.Markdown:
# Pict Section Content

Welcome to **pict-section-content** — a markdown renderer with first-class support for Mermaid diagrams and KaTeX equations.

## What it does

The `PictContentProvider` parses a markdown string into HTML; the `Pict-View-Content` view displays it and post-processes any Mermaid blocks or KaTeX math inside.

- Headings, paragraphs, lists, blockquotes, tables
- _Italic_, **bold**, `inline code`
- Fenced code blocks with syntax highlighting and line numbers
- GitHub-flavored markdown tables
- Mermaid diagrams (rendered inline via the `mermaid` global)
- KaTeX inline math like $E = mc^2$ and display math:

$$
\int_{-\infty}^{\infty} e^{-x^2} \, dx = \sqrt{\pi}
$$

## A code block

```javascript
const libPictSectionContent = require('pict-section-content');

// Register the provider and view
this.pict.addProvider('Pict-Content',
    libPictSectionContent.PictContentProvider.default_configuration,
    libPictSectionContent.PictContentProvider);

this.pict.addView('Pict-Content',
    libPictSectionContent.default_configuration,
    libPictSectionContent);

// Parse markdown and display
let tmpHTML = this.pict.providers['Pict-Content'].parseMarkdown(tmpMarkdown);
this.pict.views['Pict-Content'].displayContent(tmpHTML);
```

## A Mermaid diagram

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    A[Markdown] --> B[PictContentProvider]
    B --> C{Has Mermaid?}
    C -->|Yes| D[mermaid.run]
    C -->|No| E[Skip]
    D --> F[Rendered Page]
    E --> F
```

## A table

| Feature        | Supported | Notes                         |
| -------------- | --------- | ----------------------------- |
| Headings       | Yes       | h1 through h6                 |
| Bold / Italic  | Yes       | `**bold**`, `_italic_`        |
| Code blocks    | Yes       | With syntax highlighting      |
| Mermaid        | Yes       | Needs `mermaid` global loaded |
| KaTeX          | Yes       | Needs `katex` global loaded   |

> Edit this markdown in the **Initial AppData** tab and click **Run** to see the changes.
